creator: scjamorim@bsd.com.br
text:
Thanks Sahil

I can to test in weekend.

Big hug.

Regards,

Sylvio Cesar


2009/10/7 Sahil Tandon <sahil@tandon.net>:
> If the port is built WITH_VDA defined, then the distinfo needs to
> contain references to the VDA patch files. =A0This is, of course, if the
> VDA patch compiles properly with 2.5.9. =A0If not, then the port needs to
> be set to IGNORE=3D in case WITH_VDA is defined.
>
> I'm happy to test the VDA patch with 2.5.9 as well as 2.3.19
> (ports/139399) if you are unable to do it, but it will take me a few
> days. =A0Thanks for your efforts!
>
> --
> Sahil Tandon <sahil@tandon.net>
>
